title: SQPro Legacy Electric Kettle 1.8 L (Quartz Silver)
description: Product Description Unique Design: The SQ Professional GEMS Legacy Kettle combines powerful performance with elegant design features and modern technology for a quality kitchen appliance. With eight different colour options available, integrated with the classic stainless steel body, you’re sure to find a perfect match that will beautifully compliment any fun and contemporary kitchen. High Quality Features: With a generous 1.8 litre fill capacity and 2200 Watt heating element, the GEMS Legacy Kettle is ideal for making a quick cuppa or several hot drinks for large gatherings. The conveniently positioned, soft touch, heat resistant handle allowS stress-free pouring without straining the wrist. Safe and Convenient: When the GEMS Legacy Kettle is in operation, the power button will indicate a blue LED light, making it easy to monitor when the kettle has finished boiling. Inclusively designed, the appliance features a 360-degree swivel base allowing easy, comfortable handling for both left and right hand users. The anti-slip feet, ensure the product stays safe and sturdy during use. Take advantage of the easy view water gauge to accurately measure the exact level of water you need, to save your valuable time and energy.
